Please join Wesley and me as we pray for strength and healing for Susie and support for her family, friends, and loved ones.

Susie is the best of the best, and we know she’s going to give this fight everything she’s got and come out on top.


Rapid Response 47 (@RapidResponse47)







— https://nitter.net/RapidResponse47/status/2033573681973133389#m

TSA officers have gone 74 days without a paycheck in FY26 because of Democrats’ two shutdowns. This is absolutely unacceptable. 

Democrats need to end their political posturing, stop using our TSA agents as political pawns, and fully fund DHS.


Secretary Sean Duffy (@SecDuffy)

🚨AIRLINE CEOs: ENOUGH OF THE SCHUMER DHS SHUTDOWN🚨

Kudos to the CEOs from our airlines and shipping companies for standing up for @TSA workers as they go into another week without getting paid! ✍️⬇️





— https://nitt

Democrats could end the suffering they’re inflicting upon hundreds of thousands of Americans today.

It’s time for Democrats to stop pandering to their political base and fund ALL of DHS so we can pay EVERY SINGLE man and woman who is working to keep our nation secure.


Rapid Response 47 (@RapidResponse47)

WSJ EDITORIAL BOARD: "As the lines at airport security get worse, frustrated travelers should know who’s to blame: Sen. Chuck Schumer."
wsj.com/opinion/tsa-lines-dh…




— https://nitter.net

Daily reminder that Democrats blocked funding for HOMELAND SECURITY including the Coast Guard, Secret Service, and TSA. 

ICE and CBP are still funded and will continue to deport criminal illegal aliens.

It’s time for Democrats to stop using hardworking Americans as political pawns and end this shutdown.


Rapid Response 47 (@RapidResponse47)

NEW: Major airlines call on Congress to fund @DHSgov and pay TSA workers, who've now missed a partial and full paycheck. 

The Democrat shutdown has caused immense harm to American travelers and workers — and it needs to end.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/RapidResponse47/status/2033523531162460611#m

Alabama: Stay safe and weather aware this evening. 

Review your emergency plan before heading to bed and have multiple ways to receive alerts and updates throughout the night.


WAKA Weather (@ALWeatherNet)

TORNADO WATCH until 4am Monday. Primary threats include: a couple tornadoes possible, scattered damaging winds and isolated significant gusts to 75 mph (Hurricane Force), isolated large hail events to 1 inch in diameter possible. Stay weather aware! #alwx





— https://nitter.net/ALWeather

From our farmers and cattlemen to producers and foresters, Alabama agriculture feeds our families, fuels our economy, and sustains communities across our state. I’m deeply grateful for the hardworking men and women who make it all possible.

Daily reminder that Democrats blocked funding for HOMELAND SECURITY including the Coast Guard, Secret Service, and TSA.

ICE and CBP are still funded and will continue to deport criminal illegal aliens.

Wesley and I are devastated to hear of the passing of Sgt. Ashley Pruitt and Capt. Ariana Savino, two more Alabamians who paid the ultimate sacrifice while supporting operations overseas.

Please join us as we continue to pray for all of our service members abroad and deeply mourn those we have lost.

May God rest their souls.


AL.com (@aldotcom)

Three of the six service members killed in a plane crash in support of Operation Epic Fury were members of a historic Alabama-based squadron. Maj. Jo

If you serve in our Coast Guard, Secret Service, CBP, or any of our vital DHS agencies, this is now 72 days of missed paychecks in FY26. 

That’s families missing more than 40% of their paychecks because of Democrat shutdowns. 

All because Democrats prioritize illegal aliens.

We’ve since learned that one of these brave service members was an Alabamian, Maj. Alex Klinner. Wesley and I are incredibly heartbroken. 

Please join us and our entire state as we mourn this loss and lift his family, community, and loved ones up in prayer. 

We will never forget his service and sacrifice.


Senator Katie Boyd Britt (@SenKatieBritt)

I’m heartbroken to learn that six American heroes on a U.S. KC-135 have tragically lost their lives serving our nation. 

I join our entire nation

Daily reminder that Democrats blocked funding for HOMELAND SECURITY including the Coast Guard, Secret Service, and TSA.

ICE and CBP are still funded and will continue to deport criminal illegal aliens.

We accomplished a lot in the last year since I spoke to @NFRW, but there is a lot more still to do. 

Pass the SAVE America Act. 

Fully fund DHS. 

Let’s get it done!

Video

Working moms deserve the support that reflects the realities they face today.

That’s why I was proud to vote to pass the Working Families Tax Cuts Act, which included long-overdue updates to three child care tax credits I fought to secure. 

Republicans listened to America’s families and delivered.


Senate Republicans (@SenateGOP)







— https://nitter.net/SenateGOP/status/2032485280716845189#m

Democrats are picking WINNERS and LOSERS when it comes to who they think should receive a paycheck and who shouldn’t. 

Republicans believe EVERY man and woman who raised their hand to protect the American people by serving under DHS should get paid, including TSA agents, FEMA employees, members of our Coast Guard and Secret Service, CBP and ICE officers, and more.

I’m heartbroken to learn that six American heroes on a U.S. KC-135 have tragically lost their lives serving our nation. 

I join our entire nation in praying for their loved ones and honoring their service and memories.


U.S. Central Command (@CENTCOM)

All Crew Members of U.S. KC-135 Loss in Iraq Confirmed Deceased

TAMPA, Fla. – All six crew members aboard a U.S. KC-135 refueling aircraft that went down in western Iraq are now confirmed deceased. The aircraft was lost while flying over friend

If you miss a flight, thank a Senate Democrat. 

SIX TIMES this week Republicans tried to fully fund DHS and pay TSA workers, along with the other men and women who work every day to keep Americans safe.  

Democrats refuse because they want to defund law enforcement and take us back to Biden’s failed open border policies. They’re using hardworking Americans as political pawns in that quest.


Tom Miller (@TomMillerNews)
